top_signals.title: Grayscale says Strategy’s recent bitcoin sales should restore confidence in its financing structure
top_signals.summary: "Strategy is selling more bitcoin. But this will restore confidence in its financing structure and help bitcoin find a more durable bottom."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: I’m 60, please don’t give me a Freedom Pass
top_signals.summary: Free travel for the over 60s is a perverse incentive for older people to lead more sedentary lifestyles and it’s paid for by people who need the money more, says Guto Harri I’m not in denial. I know today is a big birthday and I’m getting on a bit, but I’m happy and grateful to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Non-compete clauses are restraining Britain’s talent market
top_signals.summary: In the US, you can hire someone for a senior role and have them at their desk in a matter of weeks. Britain should ban non-compete clauses to enable the same.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AVAX One launches CEO search after leader of its Avalanche treasury pivot steps down
top_signals.summary: SkyBridge founder Anthony Scaramucci backed AVAX One's $550 million Avalanche treasury strategy announced last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
